history.text: Eswatini was granted independence, completing the formal transition to sovereign statehood.
Eswatini joined the United Nations, confirming broad international recognition.
The current constitution came into force, setting the basic framework for today's Eswatini.
Eswatini's official name was changed, updating the country's modern state identity.
